chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-172 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on application for urgent hearing. 2. For orders on office objection(s) 3. For orders on application for exemption 4. For hearing of main case 13.02.2025 *** 1to4. None present nor any intimation has been received. Petitioner is civil servant and vide Order dated 29.10.2024 his earlier petition bearing No.D-1144 of 2024 has already been dismissed by this Court on the point of jurisdiction. This petition is also not maintainable and stands dismissed in limine alongwith listed application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
